questions.question: Explain the role of hardware in supporting a data warehouse architecture. What are the key characteristics of hardware required for efficient data warehousing?

Compare and contrast the differences between a relational database management system (RDBMS) and a NoSQL database in the context of a data warehouse. How do these differences impact the choice of database software?

What is the purpose of the operating system in supporting a data warehouse infrastructure? Provide an example of an operating system that is commonly used in data warehousing environments and explain its benefits.
